title: Device Settings - All toggles ON - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons in Device Settings should persist their ON state after closing the tab, settings page, or restarting the app.
steps: Open Lens app with headset connected, go to Device Settings.
Open each tab and set all toggle buttons to ON.
Close and reopen each section — toggles should remain ON.
Return to Device Home Screen, reopen Device Settings, and check sections — toggles should remain ON.
Restart the app, reopen Device Settings, and check each tab — all toggles should remain ON.
expected: All toggle buttons in Device Settings persist their ON state after closing the tab, settings page, or the app.
